name: Do I need a lawyer for workers comp after job accident in Millcreek?
description: No, but yes for max benefits—contingency fee.[2]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for workers comp after job accident in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, but yes for max benefits—contingency fee.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required, but highly recommended as insurers deny 20%+ claims initially and undervalue settlements; lawyers get 20-30% higher benefits at no upfront cost (contingency + fee cap). They handle paperwork, appeals.[2] Key factors: complex disputes, retaliation risks, third-party suits. Free consult assesses case; hire local expert. Self-rep risks less money.
